name: @pangolin/extension-e2e
description: Pangolin extension end-to-end gate -- Node integration test (injected stdio host-bridge) + Mocha + Chai. See docs/issue-plans/mvp4-g-extension-e2e.md (Q-c).

scripts.build:desktop: cargo build -p pangolin-desktop --features test-hooks,custom-protocol && cargo build -p pangolin-native-messaging-host --features test-hooks
scripts.e2e: pnpm build:desktop && pnpm build:extension && pnpm test:e2e
